note: Phase 2 of issue #209: filtered report exports. Hand-authored mission. Fetch pre-built bugs.json on demand, filter in the browser with the same conservative <=25-sample logic as the on-screen view (filterBugsByExclusion), download filtered bugs.json + bugs.csv. Three WPs: factor bugsCsvTable (schema single-source), browser fetch/filter/download, docs. check:spec-kitty passes.

Browser fetch->filter->download. exclusionBox gains data-bugs-json (Accessibility page) + a hidden Filtered CSV/JSON row revealed by apply() only when a list is active and bugs.json is present. exclusionFilterScript: filterBugsData mirrors the on-screen conservative rule (drop only when complete && all excluded; else trim sample; scale counts for complete findings, keep counts for >25 samples); bugsToCsv mirrors bugsCsvTable headers + csvField escaping; fetch(bugsJsonHref) on click, download filtered .json (keeps archive shape + filtered_by) and .csv. Verified in real Chromium: all-medicare finding dropped, mixed finding trimmed 2->1 pages/4->2 instances, and the filtered CSV is byte-identical to server toCsv(bugsCsvTable(filtered)). npm run test:unit 276 pass; i18n template 587; i18n:check clean. FR-02/03/04, C-01/02/03/04, NFR-01/02 satisfied. Remaining: WP03 docs.
